remaining_tasks.name: Plan 03-03: COMPLETE. Full _attach_cable_to_gripper_impl + 4-surface MCP atom + verified live (PhysicsFixedJoint at /World/UR5e/aic_unified_robot/gripper_hande_finger_link_l/CableAttachJoint with body0=finger_link, body1=link_20). Phase 1 13/13 maintained after fresh restart. Hot-reload via touch can break parity_publishers rclpy state — restart required to recover, NOT a real regression.

Plan 03-04 (RE-RE-SCOPED): publish BOTH /scoring/tf AND /objects_poses_real (TFMessage of cable + plug + port + task_board frames) from parity_publishers. Discovered ScoringTier2.cc IS the canonical /scoring/tf consumer (only active in tier2 scoring mode, not standard aic_eval). Frame parent='world'; children must include 'task_board*' substring per ScoringTier2.cc:51-53 grep.

Plan 03-05 RE-INSTATED: PARITY-07 /scoring/insertion_event publisher. Discovered ScoringTier2.cc kInsertionEventTopic='/scoring/insertion_event' IS the consumer. Use Plan 02-06 omni.physx contact-report subscription pattern, filtered for plug-end link (link_20) ↔ port-link contacts.
Plan 03-06: smoke + verify harness + REQUIREMENTS flips + 03-SUMMARY
Phase 4: trial loader + E2E aic_engine + CheatCode
M1 ships when every sample_config.yaml trial passes against Isaac Sim

blockers.title: kilted ↔ humble fastrtps type-hash incompatibility blocks engine-side stock-message subscription
blockers.summary: trial_1 dry-run: load_trial PASS, engine starts cleanly, then `Failed to find a valid clock` (10s timeout in aic_engine.cpp:457-459). Container w/ rmw_fastrtps_cpp + ROS_DOMAIN_ID=7 sees /clock in topic list (publisher count=1 RELIABLE) but receives ZERO messages over 12s direct rclpy subscribe. Same for /joint_states. Wave 1 A2=PASS only verified custom-built aic_control_interfaces (matched ABI by same-workspace build) and humble-side host subscriber — not the kilted-container ↔ humble-Isaac-Sim path for stock messages.
blockers.evidence: .planning/phases/04-trial-loader/dryrun_trial_1.txt — full 4-iteration audit including FASTDDS_BUILTIN_TRANSPORTS=UDPv4, --ipc=host, ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY toggle, direct rclpy bypass — all received 0 messages from container side.
mitigation_options: (a) zenoh-fastdds bridge process between Isaac Sim and engine container — ~1h infra, package availability uncertain on this host
(b) Build aic_engine + aic_adapter from source against humble in a derived image — ~60min build, gz-version conflicts likely
(c) Use ROS 2 domain_bridge for per-message bridging — ~30min, adds latency
(d) Migrate Isaac Sim's ROS workspace to kilted — ~3h, touches Phase 1 PARITY infra
blockers.user_decision_required: Which mitigation path. Likely (b) is cleanest M1 path; (a) is infrastructurally lightest but uncertain. (c) is the fastest if domain_bridge can be added to my-eval-isaac.
blockers.impact_on_phase_4: Plan 04-04 (parity_report.py) hits the same blocker. Plan 04-05 PARITY-07 flag-flip preserved at [~] until cleared. M1 ship gate cannot close until trials run end-to-end.
what_works: load_trial MCP atom (Plan 04-02) — full trial_1 spawned in Isaac Sim correctly
Engine container starts, parses 3 trials, init reaches clock-wait gate
D-13 fallback (Plan 04-03 Sub-A) wired: live port paths from spawned[] override hardcoded _PORT_LINK_PATHS
Recursive PhysxContactReportAPI tag-walk: 2 ports tagged (plug + sc_port_visual); plumbing for /scoring/insertion_event is correct
my-eval-isaac:v1 derived image (engine-only entrypoint; no Gazebo)
run_aic_engine_against_isaac_sim.sh wrapper (cache check + Isaac Sim status + load_trial + 2 docker containers + log tail + teardown)

decisions.decision: Phase 3 PARITY-07 (/scoring/insertion_event) DEFERRED — no live analog in aic_eval container. Phase 4 will revisit when CheatCode trial reveals if it's actually consumed.
decisions.rationale: Plan 03-01 live snapshot 2026-05-05 confirmed /scoring/* topics never advertised in live aic_eval; they are sample_config.yaml ghosts.

decisions.decision: Phase 3 PARITY-08 RE-SCOPED from /scoring/tf to /objects_poses_real (tf2_msgs/TFMessage). Isaac Sim is the EXPECTED PUBLISHER (live aic_eval has subscriber but no publisher).
decisions.rationale: Live capture shows /objects_poses_real exists with subscriber=grasp_points_publisher and publisher=0; awaiting external fill. CLAUDE.md topic-parity-as-architectural-law principle applied.

decisions.decision: SCENE-05 cable physics = NVIDIA RigidBodyRopeDemo template values verbatim (density=5e-5, damping=10.0, stiffness=1.0, drives on rotY+rotZ only).
decisions.rationale: Source: ~/env_isaaclab/.../omni.physxdemos/scenes/RigidBodyRopeDemo.py. Cable is articulated chain (omni.physx.tensors warning confirmed); set_world_poses on child links is no-op as expected. Real verification = Phase 4 CheatCode trial.

decisions.decision: Plug-end link = /World/UR5e/cable/Rope/Rope/link_20 (closest to /World/UR5e/cable/sc_plug_visual at d=0.033m per Plan 03-01 probe). Cable spans link_0 (anchor) → link_20 (plug-end), 21 links in live view (53 in offline file).
